Uses of Package
tif.tagspecs

  • Packages that use tif.tagspecs 
    Package Description
    heif
    Provides high-level classes for parsing and manipulating HEIF-based files.
    tif
    Classes for parsing and manipulating TIFF-based files.
    tif.tagspecs  
  • Classes in tif.tagspecs used by heif 
    Class Description
    Taggable  
  • Classes in tif.tagspecs used by tif 
    Class Description
    Taggable  
    TagIFD_Baseline  
    TagIFD_Extension
    Extension TIFF tags defined by the TIFF 6.0 specification and common platform extensions.
    TagIFD_GPS
    Global Positioning System (GPS) sub-directory metadata tags within the DirectoryIdentifier.IFD_GPS_SUBIFD_DIRECTORY scope.
    TagIFD_Private
    Private, vendor-specific, and industry-standard extended TIFF tags within the DirectoryIdentifier.IFD_ROOT_DIRECTORY scope.
  • Classes in tif.tagspecs used by tif.tagspecs 
    Class Description
    TagExif_Interop
    Exif Interoperability sub-directory metadata tags identified within the DirectoryIdentifier.EXIF_INTEROP_DIRECTORY scope.
    Taggable  
    TagIFD_Baseline  
    TagIFD_Exif
    Exchangeable Image File Format (Exif) sub-directory metadata tags within the DirectoryIdentifier.IFD_EXIF_SUBIFD_DIRECTORY scope.
    TagIFD_Extension
    Extension TIFF tags defined by the TIFF 6.0 specification and common platform extensions.
    TagIFD_GPS
    Global Positioning System (GPS) sub-directory metadata tags within the DirectoryIdentifier.IFD_GPS_SUBIFD_DIRECTORY scope.
    TagIFD_Pointer
    Structural offset pointer tags used to navigate between TIFF sub-directories.
    TagIFD_Private
    Private, vendor-specific, and industry-standard extended TIFF tags within the DirectoryIdentifier.IFD_ROOT_DIRECTORY scope.
